steps.title: Recognize that initial placement means t = 0
steps.content:
When the beaker is first placed on the table, zero minutes have elapsed from the starting moment. So the question asks for g(0). Set up the substitution:
$$g(0) = 295 + (361-295)(2.72)^{-0.104 \cdot 0}$$

steps.title: Apply the exponent rule for any power of 0
steps.content:
Any nonzero number raised to the power 0 equals 1. Therefore $(2.72)^0 = 1$:
$$g(0) = 295 + (361-295)(1)$$
$$g(0) = 295 + 66 = 361$$
The initial temperature of the liquid was 361 kelvins.
